about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Colombian passionate about web development, with a philosophy focused on simple and adaptable designs, following good practices in markup and SEO, prioritizing efficiency and readability in coding, always in constant learning.

items.title: AniGuess
items.description: A simple game where you have to guess the name of the animation, comic or novel to which a character belongs.

items.title: Player Card
items.description: A personal project to share my UIDs from the online multiplayer games I play in one place.

items.title: Sudoku
items.description: A simple app to play Sudoku, with two difficulty levels: easy and hard, ideal for enjoying a quick challenge.

items.title: Curriculum Vitae
items.description: A traditional resume with the possibility of offering its content in several languages.

items.title: Stopwatch
items.description: A stopwatch based on the look and feel of the Google Clock application.

items.title: Fundadores
items.description: A WordPress theme for the Hogar Infantil Los Fundadores website.

items.title: Inventory management system
items.description: A web application for inventory management.

items.title: I'm Daniel
items.description: A simple personal page where I share information about myself, links and favorite quotes.

items.title: Devitácora
items.description: A personal blog about web development, blogs, and other IT topics in general. The XML template used is my own.

items.title: Technology Specialist in Information Systems Analysis and Development
items.description:
Servicio Nacional de Aprendizaje
Certifies the competencies needed to specify the requirements for the development of an information system, perform its analysis, design and code the solution, and carry out the implementation of the system, applying good quality practices throughout the software development process.

items.title: IT Systems Technician
items.description:
Instituto Nacional de Formación Técnica Profesional "Humberto Velásquez García"
Certifies the competencies required to manage and maintain the physical and logical components of a computer, as well as to support the technical processes of web and desktop application development.
